chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.329 of 2024 03.06.2024 Mr. Arshad Khan, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl. P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicants Muhammad Asif and Adil Nawaz are seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.05/2024 U/s 337 A(i), 452, 506/B, 504 PPC registered at P.S. Jamshed Quarters. They were admitted to interim pre arrest bail vide order dated 03.02.2024 and today matter is fixed for confirmation of interim pre arrest bail or otherwise. 2. FIR has been registered by the complainant, who is present in court alleging that on account of dispute over a plot, applicants/accused had abused him, issued threats of murder and beaten him with kicks and fists blows. As per medical certificate, there is only one minor injury falling u/s 337 A(i) PPC, which is bailable. Dispute over the plot is going on between the parties and a civil suit has been filed. The offence alleged do not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C and case has already been challaned. Learned Addl. P.G has formally opposed confirmation of interim pre arrest bail of the applicants. 3. Accordingly, in view of above, this bail application is allowed and the interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The bail applications are disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E A.K
